flags.message: During a web search to identify if the Court had recently granted any lead cases on the assault weapons ban issue (to explain the 17 relists/holds for this case), I saw news results indicating the Court granted Viramontes and Grant v. Higgins on June 30, 2026. While I did not see the disposition of this specific case (NAGR v. Lamont), knowing that lead cases were granted solidifies the prediction that this petition is being held for a GVR. I am flagging this in case it is considered leakage, though it relates to companion cases granted prior to the snapshot date.
